banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock applicant: Jordan Lee Whitfield, renewing a standard (non-commercial) Florida driver license, eligible on every scope gate (renewing a driver license, not a first-time credential) and eligible for the online MyDMV Portal channel (did not use the online convenience service last cycle, current credential is REAL ID compliant, no photo update, no name change, no designation add/remove or court order, not a CDL holder, credential is not marked TEMPORARY). He opts in to an emailed confirmation receipt. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real applicant's information.

eligibilityOutcome.summary: Eligible for standard Florida driver license renewal: renewing a driver license (not an ID card) and not a first-time Florida credential.

reasons.requirement: FLHSMV renews both driver licenses and ID cards through the same MyDMV Portal and office process, but on different renewal windows. Only 'driver_license' is in scope for this schema; an ID card renewal ends the flow.
reasons.sourceRef: flhsmv.gov 'Renew or Replace' — 'Florida driver license holders may renew their credential up to 18 months in advance of the expiration date and ID card holders may renew 12 months in advance of the expiration date.'

reasons.requirement: A first-time credential is a distinct issuance process, not a renewal of an existing one, so it is out of scope for this renewal schema regardless of channel.
reasons.sourceRef: flhsmv.gov 'Renew or Replace' — 'Customers must go into an office: ... If a customer is getting a Florida driver license or ID card for the first time.'

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (us/fl/flhsmv/drivers-license-renewal). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to the Florida Department of Highway Safety and Motor Vehicles or any government system. A human (the applicant) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and explicitly authorize renewal through FLHSMV's own channel (the MyDMV Portal online transaction or an in-person visit to a driver license service center) before this renewal is submitted. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
